critique_findings: Privacy acknowledgement remains necessary but does not prove live render, export, accessibility, production, or release readiness.
completion.boundary: No real evidence, real pilot, or production validation claim.

critique_findings: Evidence completeness flags remain contract checks and do not prove live render, export, accessibility, production, or release readiness.
completion.boundary: No real evidence, real pilot, or production validation claim.

tasks.title: Add Issue #8 label-state consistency check
tasks.objective: Check Issue #8 labels cannot contradict submitted-packet absence.
forbidden_work: Do not run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: CI passes without real evidence execution.

critique_findings: Issue #8 labels are metadata only and cannot substitute for a machine-checkable submitted packet.
Contradictory labels or scope claims fail while real_submitted_packet_present=false.
completion.boundary: No real evidence, real pilot, production, release, export, live-render, or accessibility validation claim.

tasks.title: Add submitted packet source-kind lock check
tasks.objective: Check only real_issue_submission can be eligible when other gates pass.
forbidden_work: Do not run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: CI passes without real evidence execution.
Only real_issue_submission can be shadow-mode eligible when other readiness gates pass.

critique_findings: Eligibility must require packet_origin=real_issue_submission and submitted/validated issue-reference status for Issue #8.
Null intake_verdict access must remain safe when a packet fails before verdict generation.
Boolean source-kind lock conditions must remain parenthesized and readable.
completion.boundary: No submitted evidence created, no real pilot run, and no production/release/live-render/export/accessibility validation claims.

tasks.title: Refresh rolling queue after submitted-packet guard set
tasks.objective: Audit RQ-0016 through RQ-0019 and write the next bounded tasks.
allowed_work: Review merged work and CI outcomes.
Restore minimum pending queue depth with legitimate bounded tasks.
forbidden_work: Do not schedule real pilot without real evidence and readiness.
acceptance_criteria: Pending queue depth is at least four legitimate tasks.

critique_findings: RQ-0016 through RQ-0019 strengthened submitted-readiness guards but did not create real evidence or authorize pilot execution.
STATUS drift after PR #54 required sync: RQ-0019 is completed and RQ-0021 is now the next executable task.
The queue needed two additional legitimate pending tasks to preserve the minimum pending backlog after RQ-0020 completion.
completion.boundary: No real evidence, real pilot, production, release, export, live-render, or accessibility validation claim.

tasks.title: Add submitted packet artifact-path allowlist check
tasks.objective: Check generated reports cannot be used as submitted source evidence.
forbidden_work: Do not run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: CI passes without real evidence execution.
Generated reports and repo bookkeeping paths cannot be used as real submitted source evidence.

critique_findings: Artifact-path allowlist must reject generated reports, readiness outputs, planning/bookkeeping files, STATUS, queue, ledger, and disallowed export paths for real_issue_submission source artifacts.
Path normalization must strip only a leading ./ and continue rejecting ../, /../, and absolute paths.
This validator is a submitted-source boundary check and does not create real evidence or authorize the real pilot.
completion.boundary: No real evidence created, no real pilot run, and no production/release/live-render/export/accessibility validation claims.

tasks.title: Add actual cross-review record generation path
tasks.objective: Add a bounded path for creating and validating cross-review request and review-record artifacts for sensitive automation tasks.
allowed_work: Add/extend validation for generated cross-review record paths.
Update reusable automation docs if needed.
forbidden_work: Do not claim an external reviewer ran unless a validated review record exists.
Do not satisfy sensitive task quality with self-critique alone.
Do not run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: Cross-review can be requested and recorded through a machine-checkable artifact path.
Missing/malformed records cannot satisfy the quality gate.
CI passes without real evidence or production claims.

critique_findings: Cross-review generation path is machine-checkable but does not prove a separate external reviewer has run.
The blocked review-record template must preserve deterministic false defaults, strict reviewer policy fields, and exact boundary assertions.
This is automation quality-control scaffolding only and does not create real responsive or pilot evidence.
completion.boundary: No real evidence created, no real pilot run, and no production/release/live-render/export/accessibility validation claims.

tasks.title: Add submitted packet issue-reference consistency check
tasks.objective: Ensure submitted packets cannot claim eligibility unless issue_reference targets Issue #8 and matches the expected evidence submission state.
allowed_work: Add or extend a bounded validator for issue_reference consistency.
Add negative fixtures for wrong issue number, missing issue_url_or_ref, or stale evidence_submission_status.
Wire the check into CI if a new validator is created.
forbidden_work: Do not run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: Wrong issue reference cannot pass submitted-readiness eligibility.
CI passes without real evidence execution.

tasks.title: Add submitted packet freshness and sample-marker rejection check
tasks.objective: Ensure stale, sample-marked, or placeholder-hash submitted packets cannot be treated as real issue submissions.
allowed_work: Add or extend bounded validation for sample markers and placeholder hashes.
Add negative fixtures for SAMPLE, .sample, sha256-sample-placeholder, and placeholder payload hash markers.
Document the evidence-boundary rule if needed.
forbidden_work: Do not run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: Sample markers and placeholder hashes block submitted eligibility.
CI passes without real evidence execution.

tasks.title: Refresh queue after cross-review and submitted-packet boundary tasks
tasks.objective: Audit RQ-0021 through RQ-0024, reconcile bookkeeping drift, and write the next bounded tasks without creating real evidence.
allowed_work: Review merged work and CI outcomes for RQ-0021 through RQ-0024.
Restore minimum pending queue depth with legitimate bounded tasks.
forbidden_work: Do not run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: Pending queue depth is restored with legitimate tasks after completed work.

tasks.title: Sync master spec with rolling queue controller state
tasks.objective: Update PROJECT_MASTER_SPEC.md so its repository-state summary no longer describes the obsolete P0 hardening pull-request state.
allowed_work: Reference STATUS and queue state without upgrading evidence truth.
forbidden_work: Do not run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: Master spec no longer contradicts active rolling queue state.
No evidence or readiness claim is upgraded.
CI passes without real evidence execution.
